search.query: | tstats `summariesonly` count from datamodel=Cisco_DCN_nexus_dashboard.advisories by advisories.nd_host | rename advisories.nd_host as nd_host
| tstats `summariesonly` count from datamodel=Cisco_DCN_nexus_dashboard.advisories where advisories.nd_host="$nd_host_token$" by advisories.fabricName | rename advisories.fabricName as fabricName

| tstats `summariesonly` dc(advisories.advisoryId) as count from datamodel=Cisco_DCN_nexus_dashboard.advisories where advisories.nd_host="$nd_host_token$" advisories.fabricName="$site_token$" by advisories.category, advisories.advisoryId, advisories.nd_host, advisories.fabricName | rename advisories.category as category | stats sum(count) by category

| tstats `summariesonly` dc(advisories.advisoryId) as count from datamodel=Cisco_DCN_nexus_dashboard.advisories where advisories.nd_host="$nd_host_token$" advisories.fabricName="$site_token$" by advisories.calculated_severity, advisories.advisoryId, advisories.nd_host, advisories.fabricName | rename advisories.calculated_severity as severity | stats sum(count) by severity

| tstats `summariesonly` count from datamodel=Cisco_DCN_nexus_dashboard.advisories where advisories.nd_host="$nd_host_token$" advisories.fabricName="$site_token$" by advisories.category | rename advisories.category as category

| tstats `summariesonly` count from datamodel=Cisco_DCN_nexus_dashboard.advisories where advisories.nd_host="$nd_host_token$" advisories.fabricName="$site_token$" by advisories.severity | rename advisories.severity as severity

| tstats `summariesonly` count from datamodel=Cisco_DCN_nexus_dashboard.advisories where advisories.nd_host="$nd_host_token$" advisories.fabricName="$site_token$" by advisories.cleared | rename advisories.cleared as cleared

| tstats `summariesonly` count from datamodel=Cisco_DCN_nexus_dashboard.advisories where advisories.nd_host="$nd_host_token$" advisories.fabricName="$site_token$" by advisories.resourceType | rename advisories.resourceType as resourceType

| tstats `summariesonly` dc(advisories.advisoryId) as count from datamodel=Cisco_DCN_nexus_dashboard.advisories where advisories.nd_host="$nd_host_token$" advisories.fabricName="$site_token$" $set_severity_token$ advisories.category="$category_token$" advisories.category="$category_token$" advisories.cleared="$clear_token$" advisories.resourceType="$resourceType_token$" by advisories.advisoryId, advisories.nd_host, advisories.fabricName | stats sum(count) as count | fillnull value=0 count | appendpipe [ stats count as count | where count==0 | eval count=0 ]

| tstats `summariesonly` latest(advisories.category) as _category latest(advisories.severity) as "Severity" latest(advisories.startTs) as "Detection Time (UTC)" latest(advisories.nd_host) as "Host" latest(advisories.fabricName) as "Site" latest(advisories.endTs) as "Last Seen Time (UTC)" latest(advisories.resourceType) as "Resource Type" dc(advisories.node_names) as "Affected Nodes" latest(advisories.title) as "Title" latest(advisories.cleared) as "Cleared" from datamodel=Cisco_DCN_nexus_dashboard.advisories where advisories.nd_host="$nd_host_token$" advisories.fabricName="$site_token$" $set_severity_token$ advisories.category="$category_token$" advisories.category="$category_token$" advisories.cleared="$clear_token$" advisories.resourceType="$resourceType_token$" by advisories.advisoryId, advisories.nd_host, advisories.fabricName | rename advisories.advisoryId as _id | table _id, _category, _group, "Host", "Site","Severity","Detection Time (UTC)", "Last Seen Time (UTC)", "Resource Type", "Affected Nodes", "Title", "Cleared" | sort 0 -"Last Seen Time (UTC)"

drilldown.set: advisories.nd_host="$ndHost_token$" advisories.fabricName="$row.Site$" advisories.advisoryId="$row._id$" advisories.startTs="$row.Detection Time (UTC)$" advisories.endTs="$row.Last Seen Time (UTC)$" advisories.cleared=$row.Cleared$ advisories.severity="$row.Severity$" advisories.category="$row._category$"

search.query: | tstats `summariesonly` values(advisories.resourceType) as "Type" values(advisories.startTs) as "Detection Time (UTC)" values(advisories.endTs) as "End Time (UTC)" values(advisories.clearTs) as cleared_time values(advisories.advisoryStr) as "Description" values(advisories.acknowledged) as "Acknowledged" values(advisories.verificationStatus) as "Verification Status" values(advisories.assignee) as "Assignee" from datamodel=Cisco_DCN_nexus_dashboard.advisories where $search_token$ | eval Status=if($cleared_token$ == "false", "Active", "Cleared"), "Cleared Time (UTC)"=if(cleared_time="null" OR isnull(cleared_time),"-",cleared_time) | eval "Explore Advisory Details" = "Open on ND" | table "Type", "Status", "Detection Time (UTC)", "End Time (UTC)", "Cleared Time (UTC)", "Description", "Verification Status", "Acknowledged", "Assignee", "Explore Advisory Details"
